Please refer to this guide to get your a: Please refer to this guide to get your api credentials: https://support.atlassian.com/atlassian-account/docs/manage-api-tokens-for-your-atlassian-account
Get page content and optionally all its: Get page content and optionally all its descendants
Fetches a page by its Confluence web URL: Fetches a page by its Confluence web URL (extracts the page ID automatically).
Finds a page by exact title, optionally: Finds a page by exact title, optionally scoped to a space.
Search Confluence content with CQL (Conf: Search Confluence content with CQL (Confluence Query Language). Example: `type = "page" AND space = "DOCS" AND title ~ "release"`.
Creates a new page in a space with the g: Creates a new page in a space with the given title and body.
Creates a new page from a template with: Creates a new page from a template with the given title and variables.
Updates the title, body, or status of an: Updates the title, body, or status of an existing page.
Trashes or permanently deletes a page.
Moves a page to a new parent as a child,: Moves a page to a new parent as a child, sibling, or to the top of the parent.
Publishes a draft page (changes status f: Publishes a draft page (changes status from draft to current).
Adds a footer comment to a page.
Replies to an existing footer comment on: Replies to an existing footer comment on a page.
Lists footer and/or inline comments on a: Lists footer and/or inline comments on a page.
Uploads a file as an attachment to a pag: Uploads a file as an attachment to a page.
Downloads an attachment file by its ID a: Downloads an attachment file by its ID and returns it as a file.
Lists all attachments on a page.
Adds one or more labels to a page.
Removes a label from a page.
Looks up Confluence users by name, email: Looks up Confluence users by name, email, or keyword.
Lists all spaces the authenticated user: Lists all spaces the authenticated user can access.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 将一个自定义 API 调用到一个特定的终点
Title: 标题
Label: Label
Get this from the page URL of your Confl: Get this from the page URL of your Confluence Cloud
If checked, will fetch all child pages r: If checked, will fetch all child pages recursively.
Paste any Confluence page URL, e.g. http: Paste any Confluence page URL, e.g. https://your-domain.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/DOCS/pages/12345/My+Page
Comma-separated list of properties to ex: Comma-separated list of properties to expand (e.g. `body.storage,version,space,history`).
Page content in the selected format.
Leave blank to keep the current title.
New page content. Leave blank to keep ex: New page content. Leave blank to keep existing body.
If enabled, the page is removed from the: If enabled, the page is removed from the trash permanently. Otherwise it is moved to trash.
The page to move relative to. Use \"appe: The page to move relative to. Use "append" or "before" to nest under it, "after" to place as sibling.
ID of the draft page to publish.
Comment body in storage (XHTML) format. Plain text works too.
The ID of the comment to reply to.
Optional comment associated with this at: Optional comment associated with this attachment version.
If enabled, no notifications are sent to: If enabled, no notifications are sent to page watchers.
ID of the attachment to download. Use \": ID of the attachment to download. Use "List Attachments" to look up IDs.
Label names to add (one per row).
Username, email, or display name to sear: Username, email, or display name to search for.
Authorization headers are injected autom: 授权头自动从您的连接中注入。
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
Append as last child of target: Append as last child of target
Insert as first child of target: Insert as first child of target
HEAD: 黑色
Triggers when a new page is created.
Triggers when an existing page is update: Triggers when an existing page is updated (version > 1).
Triggers when a new footer comment is ad: Triggers when a new footer comment is added to the selected page.
Triggers when a new attachment is upload: Triggers when a new attachment is uploaded to the selected page.
Triggers when a new blog post is publish: Triggers when a new blog post is published in the selected space.
